prevalence.source: European Society of Contact Dermatitis context

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant work disruption and chronic dermatitis burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical dermatitis with exposure history; patch testing for allergic contact dermatitis

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with avoidance and workplace controls

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Patch testing widely available; occupational health services engaged
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Avoidance, emollients, topical steroids; workplace protection and PPE
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Occupational exposure in small businesses and contractors
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong occupational health frameworks and access to dermatology care
